description: An IT auditor reviews the configuration of the company's AWS environment.

nodes.task_description: Review the configuration of S3 buckets to ensure none are publicly accessible.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor finds one S3 bucket that is incorrectly configured to allow public access.

nodes.task_description: Review IAM policies to ensure users have been granted permissions based on the principle of least privilege.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor identifies several users with overly broad 'administrator' privileges.

nodes.task_description: Verify that CloudTrail logging is enabled in all regions to ensure all API activity is captured.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor confirms logging is enabled correctly.
